description: Informal note addressed to Abū l-ʿAlāʾ. In Judaeo-Arabic. Andalusi hand. Asking him to "give the bearer everything that is mentioned in this letter." The sender is owed money by Abū l-M[...]. This letter is crossed out. In the same hand, on verso, there is a story about 10 (people?) who encountered a Bedouin in the streets who had a cow worth 100 dirhams and who may have tried to sell it for 8 dinars. This story is also crossed out.
description_he: פתק לא פורמלי ממוען לאבו אל-עלא. בערבית-יהודית. כתב יד אנדלוסי. מבקשו 'לתת לנושא הפתק כל מה שמוזכר במכתב זה'. בגב הדף סיפור על 10 (אנשים?) שפגשו בדואי שהיה לו פרה שווה 100 דרהם.
